The payout is 9,800 USD to a recipient whose account is 2 days old. This squarely triggers Policy P2, which mandates rejection of any payout >= 9,000 USD to recipients with accounts <= 7 days old. Compliance correctly cited P2. Per binding instructions, every veto that correctly cites P2 must be upheld with no exceptions and no conditions can cure it.
